description: Graphic formatted as a screenshot of a Truth Social post by Donald J. Trump. The layout shows a circular avatar of Trump's face in American-flag colors (blue stars area and red and white stripes), the bold name 'Donald J. Trump' with a pink verified badge and a small black Truth Social square logo, and the grey handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The body is black-on-white sans-serif text reading verbatim: 'The United States is studying and reviewing the possible reduction of Troops in Germany, with a determination to be made over the next short period of time. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: The United States is studying and reviewing the possible reduction of Troops in Germany... Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP
